nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief overview of the Archon pipelines directory, explaining what pipelines are, how they work within the system, and pointing to the schema for pipeline YAML definitions.

nodes.name: batch-sdd-pipeline.yaml
nodes.summary: Pipeline definition for batch Software Design Document (SDD) processing, orchestrating multi-step spec, implement, and review cycles for batch runs. Supports resumable execution with artifact persistence and synapse mode.

nodes.name: debug-pipeline.yaml
nodes.summary: Pipeline definition for debugging workflows, guiding agents through systematic diagnosis steps. Resumable pipeline with artifact persistence.

nodes.name: dissect-to-skill.yaml
nodes.summary: Pipeline definition implementing the DDE (Dissection-Driven Enhancement) methodology to dissect existing code patterns and create or upgrade Archon skills. Resumable with artifact persistence.

nodes.name: full-product.yaml
nodes.summary: End-to-end product development pipeline covering spec, design, implementation, review, and delivery stages for building complete products. Resumable with artifact persistence.

nodes.name: sdd-pipeline.yaml
nodes.summary: Core Software Design Document pipeline orchestrating spec-writer, implementer, and reviewer agents for a single SDD cycle. Resumable with artifact persistence.

nodes.name: skill-factory.yaml
nodes.summary: Pipeline definition for the skill factory workflow, automating the creation of new Archon skills from requirements through manifest generation, SKILL.md authoring, and validation. Resumable with artifact persistence.

nodes.name: skill-upgrade.yaml
nodes.summary: Pipeline definition for upgrading existing Archon skills through the DDE loop, dissecting current skill state and applying targeted improvements. Resumable with artifact persistence.

nodes.name: ux-pipeline.yaml
nodes.summary: UX design pipeline orchestrating research, design, implementation, and review stages for user experience improvements. Resumable with artifact persistence.
